name: Absorb/Dissipate Energy
effect: Jedi absorbs or dissipates energy including light, heat, radiation, and blaster bolts. Successful control roll dissipates energy; failure means full damage taken.

name: Accelerate Healing
effect: Jedi makes two natural healing rolls for current day regardless of injury severity, with +2 to both Strength rolls to heal.

name: Concentration
effect: Jedi clears negative thoughts and gains +4D to any one action that round; may do nothing else except use concentration and that one skill.

name: Control Disease
effect: Jedi directs her body's immune response to fight disease. Requires half-hour meditation per use; repeated rolls needed for long-standing illness.

name: Control Pain
effect: Wounded Jedi acts as if uninjured, ignoring wound penalties. If injured again while power is up, a new control roll is required at the new difficulty.

name: Detoxify Poison
effect: Jedi detoxifies or ejects poisons from her body. Successful roll means poison has no effect.

name: Emptiness
effect: Jedi empties her mind and becomes oblivious to surroundings; cannot move or act except to disengage. Gains +6 bonus to Force rolls afterward, reduced by -1 per Dark Side Point.

name: Hibernation Trance
effect: Jedi enters deep trance slowing all body functions, appears dead. Can heal while in trance but cannot act.

name: Reduce Injury
effect: Reduces severity of injury suffered in current or immediately following round to wounded; costs a Force Point.

name: Remain Conscious
effect: Jedi remains conscious after suffering normally incapacitating injuries; can perform one other action that round.

name: Resist Stun
effect: Prepares body to resist stun damage; must activate before damage is suffered. Keeps character from being knocked unconscious by stun results.

name: Life Detection
effect: Detects presence and location of all living sentient beings within 10 meters; kept up extends to approach/departure awareness.

name: Life Sense
effect: Senses presence, identity, and physical condition of a specific known person. Target may resist with control skill.

name: Magnify Senses
effect: Enhances natural senses to perceive things normally impossible without aids: distant sounds, faint scents, far visual details.

name: Receptive Telepathy
effect: Reads surface thoughts and emotions of target. If sense roll doubles difficulty, can sift memories up to 24 hours old.

name: Postcognition
effect: Investigates Force imprints on objects to determine who handled them and what events transpired. Clarity of impression depends on how much roll exceeds difficulty.

name: Sense Force
effect: Senses ambient Force within an area: strength, light/dark side tendency, type and quantity of life. Cannot detect specific sentient beings.

name: Injure/Kill
effect: Attacker touches target and makes alter roll vs target's control or Perception; on success deals damage as if brawling attack with Strength resist roll.

name: Telekinesis
effect: Levitates and moves objects up to 100 metric tons with the mind. Each additional object requires a new roll. Using to attack others costs a Dark Side Point.

name: Lightsaber Combat
effect: Jedi wields lightsaber sensing opponents through the Force, adding sense dice to attack and subtracting or adding control dice to damage.

name: Projective Telepathy
effect: Broadcasts feelings and emotions to a target; target hears thoughts and feels emotions but Jedi cannot send full sentences or control target's mind.

name: Accelerate Another's Healing
effect: Allows target to make extra healing rolls as per accelerate healing; Jedi must be touching the character.

name: Control Another's Disease
effect: Heals another character's disease using same rules as control disease; Jedi must be touching the character.

name: Control Another's Pain
effect: Allows another character to ignore wound penalties as per control pain; Jedi must be touching the character.

name: Place Another in Hibernation Trance
effect: Places willing, touching character into hibernation trance. Can also be used to bring a character out of trance.

name: Return Another to Consciousness
effect: Restores consciousness to incapacitated or mortally wounded character; Jedi must be touching the target.

name: Transfer Force
effect: Transfers Jedi's life force to save a mortally wounded character from dying; costs a Force Point. Recipient must be willing and touched.

name: Affect Mind
effect: Alters target's perceptions, memories, or conclusions. Target believes illusions are real. Cannot affect droids. One target per use unless power used multiple times.
